behaviors.description: The content passed to the summary-generation step includes data retrieved from all three sources.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is module handoff: three source clients + aggregation + call into summary step. A unit test of only the merger could miss wiring omissions. Rejected System because behavior text does not require real network/OS effects; stubbed source modules are sufficient. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because this checks input assembly, not model decision quality or multi-agent sequencing.
behaviors.test_description: Wire real aggregation/report modules with three stub source adapters returning distinct markers; assert the payload passed to summary generation contains all three source sections and values.

behaviors.description: When one data source is unavailable, the report is produced with a `data unavailable` note for that section rather than aborting.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module error propagation and fallback rendering (source adapter failure -> report builder note). Unit is too low because the failure appears at boundary handoff. Rejected System: unavailability can be reproduced by adapter error stubs; no real network behavior is required by text. Rejected Agentic/Workflow: correctness is fallback control flow, not AI output quality or multi-agent chain.
behaviors.test_description: Run report pipeline modules with one source adapter raising an availability exception and the others returning data; assert report generation completes and includes a `data unavailable` marker only for the failed section.

behaviors.description: The narrative summary accurately represents the key values present in the input data.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly targets semantic fidelity of generated narrative to data, which depends on real model output quality and can vary run-to-run. Mocked/stubbed generation would hide hallucination/omission failures. Rejected Workflow because text describes one generation judgment step, not multiple agentic decisions in sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Feed realistic report inputs with known key metrics/issues/deploy counts into the real summary-generation model and score whether produced narrative preserves those key values without contradiction across repeated runs.

behaviors.description: A complete report — from data collection through email delivery — reaches the configured recipient's inbox correctly.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary includes real external interfaces (source APIs/email transport/inbox delivery). In-process fakes can miss auth, transport, MIME, and delivery-path issues. Rejected Agentic because behavior text is delivery success (`reaches ... inbox`), not summary quality; model decision correctness is not the asserted outcome. Rejected Workflow because no multiple agentic decision chain is specified.
behaviors.test_description: Execute the scheduled script in an end-to-end environment against reachable test instances of the three data sources and a real mail sink/inbox, then verify the configured recipient mailbox receives the report with expected structure.

behaviors.description: When the email delivery service is unreachable, the generated report is saved to a local file and delivery is retried on the next scheduled run.
behaviors.justification: Behavior depends on real infrastructure boundaries: unreachable delivery service plus durable local filesystem state across runs and retry on subsequent schedule execution. Mocking can hide real persistence/retry path failures. Rejected Integration because text requires cross-run durability and service reachability transitions that are OS/network-sensitive. Rejected Agentic/Workflow because no AI-output-dependent correctness is described.
behaviors.test_description: Run script with email endpoint intentionally unreachable; assert report is persisted to disk. On next scheduled execution with endpoint restored, assert persisted report is retried/sent and local pending artifact is cleared or marked delivered.
